name: Mel Gibson

acts.description: 2006 DUI arrest during which he delivered an antisemitic tirade to arresting officers
2010 recorded phone calls threatening ex-girlfriend Oksana Grigorieva with racist and misogynist abuse

behavior_summary: Antisemitic rant during 2006 DUI arrest; recorded threatening calls to ex-girlfriend including racist abuse and threats of violence. Multiple settlements and apologies that didn't stop the pattern.

art.summary: Major directorial and acting talent responsible for genuine film landmarks. The comeback arc is ongoing and largely successful.

verdict.blurb: Braveheart is a masterpiece and he told arresting officers that Jews are responsible for all wars. Hollywood gave him a standing ovation at the 2017 Oscars anyway. Freedom!
